summary: Civil Engineering graduate with strong knowledge of construction materials, concrete technology, CAD drafting, and civil engineering fundamentals. Skilled in analytical thinking, problem solving, documentation, and technical software. Seeking opportunities to contribute to engineering projects while continuously improving professional expertise.

academicProjects.title: Experimental Study on Waste Materials as Additives in Concrete
academicProjects.description: Conducted an experimental study on Fly Ash and Rice Husk Ash as partial replacements in concrete production to improve sustainability, reduce costs, and evaluate concrete strength and durability. Responsible for: Mix Design Analysis, Material Testing, Data Collection, Documentation, and Report Preparation.
